mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.member_id AS memberId, a.id AS memberTagId, a.NAME AS memberTagName FROM member_tag a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT id, member_id, member_tag_id FROM member_tag_bind WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ) b ON a.id = b.member_tag_id WHERE a.delete_flag = 0

SELECT a.id, a.member_id as memberId, a.member_tag_id as memberTagId, b.user_nike as memberName, b.user_img as img FROM member_tag_bind a LEFT JOIN member b ON a.member_id = b.user_id WHERE a.member_tag_id = #{tagId}
SELECT b.id,b.name FROM member_tag_bind a LEFT JOIN member_tag b ON a.member_tag_id = b.id WHERE a.member_id = #{memberId}
